_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in managing data and AI vendor relationships, including contract performance monitoring, issue escalation, renewal negotiation, and vendor consolidation planning.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI OP domain. Skill OP-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.435), SP-S-004 (SP, cosine: 0.426).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.566). Shared vocabulary: [contract]. NICE-only terms [knowledge, management] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, consolidation, data, escalation, issue, managing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.894 (P=0.919, R=0.871). P exceeds R by 0.048 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of contract management" and "Skill in managing data and AI vendor relationships, including contract performan" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.569 ≈ STS 0.566 (gap 0.002). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [contract] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [contract]. NICE-only: [knowledge, management]. WIDAI-only: [ai, consolidation, data, escalation, issue, managing].
